ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport associated with the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the coach */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "overall_record" TEXT /* Current overall record of the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Current win percentage of the team */,
  "last_5_games" TEXT /* Record of the team's last 5 games */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current streak of the team (winning or losing) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the game belongs to */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule entry the result belongs to */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being tracked */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Number of yards gained by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_away_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_away_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaks" (
  "streak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streak entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "streak_type" TEXT /* Type of streak (winning or losing) */,
  "streak_length" INTEGER /* Length of the current streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("streak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "last_5_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_last_5_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "win_loss_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_loss_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team in the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "division_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being tracked */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_division_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player with the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected recovery time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
